description: next/ v2.0 — ISA-95 Part 2/4 MaterialLot (B2MML MaterialLot). TERMINOLOGY RULE : the word 'batch' is NOT used in ISA-95 and constantly causes confusion in ISA-88 — in ERP/English usage 'batch' means a 'portion' and is consistently a **MaterialLot**, NEVER an activity. A MaterialLot is an identifiable quantity of a material of a specific MaterialDefinition (Article). It sits between MaterialDefinition (SMProfile-Article) and MaterialSublot (SMProfile-Quant): OF_ARTICLE -> Article, HAS_SUBLOT -> Quant. It is produced/consumed in a SegmentResponse (PROCESSED_MATERIAL) or by a Workorder (PRODUCED_BY).

attributes.name: material_lot_no
attributes.description: Identity of the material lot (join key). Often kept in the ERP as 'Charge/batch number' — here correctly as MaterialLot.

attributes.name: article_ref
attributes.description: FK to Article.article_no (OF_ARTICLE) = MaterialLot.MaterialDefinitionID. The MaterialDefinition of this lot.

attributes.name: status
attributes.description: Lot status (ISA-95 MaterialLotProperty / Status), e.g. available, in_production, consumed, blocked.

attributes.name: workorder_ref
attributes.description: FK to Workorder.workorder_no (PRODUCED_BY). The order slot that produced this lot.

attributes.name: location_ref
attributes.description: FK to StorageLocation (AT_LOCATION). Current storage location of the lot.

relationships.description: Inverse of Quant (MaterialSublot) — the inventory sublots of this lot.
The order slot (Workorder) that produced this lot.

isa95.note: ISA-95 MaterialLot = identifiable material quantity of a MaterialDefinition. RULE: ERP 'batch' == MaterialLot (a portion of material), NEVER an activity. Sits between Article (MaterialDefinition) and Quant (MaterialSublot).
